contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 210
- Description: Sophia: turn-report fix, follow-up-monitor + governance/vault plans (handed off), CI green
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/152
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/156
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/157
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/447
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/449
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/453
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/454
  
  Details:
  Continuation of the Sophia (truesight_autopilot) work after the prior 240-min report.
  
  (1) TURN-REPORT FIX: the per-turn 'Done this turn' completion report dumped garbage on tool-heavy turns (26x '. ssh run -> {' lines, a URL with a literal backslash-n, and the message truncated past Telegram's 4096 cap). Now grouped by tool with counts, shows the command for shell tools, extracts a salient field instead of a bare brace, cleans newline leaks. Tests + deployed.
  
  (2) DURABLE FOLLOW-UP MONITOR: designed with Gary a thread-bound, multi-day follow-up system so Sophia's 'I'll check tomorrow and ping you' actually happens (today it dies when the turn ends). Definition in OPEN_FOLLOWUPS.md, scheduling state in a sidecar, working context = the thread transcript; invariant: every follow-up requires a thread_id; control surface list/steer/abort; on strike spins a full Sophia turn in the thread; probes gmail_reply + elapsed_days. Wrote the roadmap + UAT and handed off to Sophia (parked GO-ready, thread 2622).
  
  (3) MULTI-TENANT GOVERNANCE / IDENTITY / VAULT: designed the evolution of Sophia from a single-user bot into a multi-org, governance-gated agent (one policy keyed on tenant x surface x identity x action; tool-layer auth; data-vs-instruction boundary; single-tier Telegram governor auth via email-challenge binding to Contributors contact Column X; engagement modes proactive vs addressed-only; DM policy; box-local credential vault with email->RSA-gated page, never-overwrite + versioning, reference-by-name; one-instance-per-org replication). Wrote the capstone plan + full UAT and handed off Phase 0 to Sophia (parked GO-ready, thread 2744).
  
  (4) CI GREEN: diagnosed + fixed truesight_autopilot CI (red on every push) — ruff lint (E402/E741), a repo-wide ruff-format backlog (83/105 files), and a bare-pytest import failure (pythonpath). All gates now pass on main; unblocks Sophia's incoming Phase-0 PRs.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 350.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
